original text:
Journal of Craniofacial Surgery. 30(2):607-610, March/April 2019.
Journal of Craniofacial Surgery. 30(2):618, March/April 2019.
Journal of Craniofacial Surgery. 30(2):619, March/April 2019.
Journal of Craniofacial Surgery announces an increase in volume to 12 issues a year starting 2019.
​Select articles from Journal of Craniofacial Surgery issues are now available in Chinese translation.
Select abstracts from the September 2015 issue of JCS are now available in Chinese translation. View the abstracts.

original text:
FRIDAY FEATURE - MORE CONTENT COMING TO MY YOUTUBE CHANNEL!
Yo! Hope everyone had a great Thanksgiving and/or holiday from the hustle and bustle as we officially enter the holiday season. This week I took a step away from the blog's usual content. I wanted to start introducing y'all to more of my other creative ideas aside from music.
​For today's Friday Feature, I decided to share my first STORYTIME video, talking about running into my ex at the club. Lol. Check it out, leave a comment, and feel free to SHARE this! Let me know what y'all think, I look forward to growing in front of all of y'all. THERE'S ALSO A SPECIAL MUSIC ANNOUNCEMENT AT THE END OF THIS VIDEO!
